prestazioni: Engine swap to a Suzuki-sourced F6A 657cc turbocharged inline-3 (original engine code: S07A, but upgraded with a HKS GT-SS turbocharger, custom 80mm intercooler, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise boost control up to 1.2 bar)
Full drivetrain reinforcement with a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential, OS Giken 4.55 final gear ratio, and a Tilton twin-plate clutch with a lightweight flywheel for rapid gear engagement

Suspension overhaul with Tein Flex Z coilovers (specifically valved for the AZ-1’s 720kg weight), Cusco front strut tower bar, and Whiteline rear sway bar to eliminate body roll in tight kei-car corners
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny PB-AZ1 widebody kit with carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser to accommodate 15x8 +38 Work Meister S1 3P wheels wrapped in 195/50R15 Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires
Custom rear-mounted HKS Hi-Power exhaust with a 70mm titanium tip exiting through the factory rear bumper cutout for a JDM kei-car signature sound

Full interior strip with Bride Zeta III bucket seats, Takata 4-point harnesses, and a Momo Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, paired with a custom aluminum dashboard overlay by Autozam specialist Garage Vary
